heading: Additional contribution to special funds; authorization of appropriations
label: 285z Additional contribution to special funds; authorization of appropriations
notes: Codificationis based on section 201 of title II of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 29 of Pub. L. 89–369Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987

children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to contribute on behalf of the United States $584,280,000 to the Asian Development Fund, a special Fund of the Bank, except that any commitment to make such contributions shall be made subject to obtaining the necessary appropriations.

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the United States contribution provided for in subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $584,280,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
